name: Apple Pie Bread
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Coat a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan with nonstick cooking spray.
Whisk together flour, oats, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt in a bowl.
In a separate bowl, beat Egg, Egg white, brown sugar, honey, and vegetable oil until smooth.
Add buttermilk and mix well.
Stir in the flour mixture and chopped apples until combined.
Pour batter into prepared pan and bake for 50 to 60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted comes out clean. The crust may crack.
Cool in pan on wire rack for about 10 minutes. Turn out onto rack and cool completely. Makes 1 loaf.
